allow: Bash(sqlite3 data.db "SELECT count\(*\) FROM activities WHERE name = ''Morning Run'' AND distance >= 5000 AND distance <= 6000 AND average_speed >= 3.3333 AND average_speed <= 4.0;")

Bash(node -e "const Database = require\(''better-sqlite3''\); const db = new Database\(''data.db''\); console.log\(db.prepare\(""SELECT training_category, count\(*\) as cnt FROM activities WHERE name = ''Morning Run'' AND distance >= 5000 AND distance <= 6000 AND average_speed >= 3.3333 AND average_speed <= 4.0 GROUP BY training_category""\).all\(\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const Database = require\(''better-sqlite3''\); const db = new Database\(''data.db''\); const result = db.prepare\(""UPDATE activities SET training_category = ''WU/CD'' WHERE name = ''Morning Run'' AND distance >= 5000 AND distance <= 6000 AND average_speed >= 3.3333 AND average_speed <= 4.0""\).run\(\); console.log\(''Updated:'', result.changes\);")

Bash(node -e "const Database = require\(''better-sqlite3''\); const db = new Database\(''data.db''\); const r1 = db.prepare\(""UPDATE activities SET training_category = ''WU/CD'' WHERE training_category = ''Warm Up''""\).run\(\); const r2 = db.prepare\(""UPDATE activities SET training_category = ''WU/CD'' WHERE training_category = ''Cool Down''""\).run\(\); console.log\(''Warm Up migrated:'', r1.changes, ''| Cool Down migrated:'', r2.changes\); const r3 = db.prepare\(""UPDATE category_rules SET category = ''WU/CD'' WHERE category = ''Warm Up'' OR category = ''Cool Down''""\).run\(\); console.log\(''Rules migrated:'', r3.changes\);")

Bash(node -e "const Database = require\(''better-sqlite3''\); const db = new Database\(''data.db''\); console.log\(db.prepare\(""SELECT training_category, count\(*\) as cnt FROM activities WHERE lower\(name\) LIKE ''%heat%'' GROUP BY training_category""\).all\(\)\);")
